title: pecteilis ciliolaris
intro: Pecteilis ciliolaris, also known as the Chinese ladies' slipper orchid, is a type of orchid native to China and other parts of East Asia, recognized by its distinctive slipper-shaped flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pecteilis ciliolaris include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules for its therapeutic effects.
